title: Campaign Monitor vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Mailgun: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Mailgun?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Mailgun?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
